verses.text: “Note' mai-ah ka koih, na teel ding thu thupha leh samsiatna, hih nate khempeuh note tungah hong tungin, Topa in note hong hawlkhiatna minamte lakah hih thute phawk kikin
Topa note' Pasian' kiangah note leh na suan na khakte uh paikikin, na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh tuni-a kong gen ama thute na man' uh ciangin
Topa na Pasian un note na ngei uh hong bangsak kikin, note tungah hehpihna hong nei ding a, Topa na Pasian un note hong thehthangna mi khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawm kik ding hi
A kihawlkhia na mite uh van mong pekah a om leh zong, Topa na Pasian un tua lai panin note hong khawmin, tua lai panin amah in hong paipih ding hi
Note in na neih theihna dingun, na pu na pate uh neih leitangah, Topa na Pasian un hong paipih ding a, na pu na pate uh sangin a citheizaw a tamzaw-in note hong bawl ding hi

Note in na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh itin na hin'theihna dingun, Topa na Pasian un note leh na suanlekhakte uh tungah thu man' nopna lungsim hong guan' ding hi
Topa na Pasian un hih samsiatnate khempeuh, no hong bawlsia na galte uh leh na langte uh tungah tungsak ding hi
Note in Topa' thu mangkikin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zui ding uh hi

Note in hih thukham laibu sunga kigelh ama thupiaknate leh ama thukhamte zui-in, Topa na Pasian uh thu na man' uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh lamah na kihei uh leh, Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uh, note' suanlekhakte, na ganhingte uh panin a piangte, leh na leitang panun a piang khempeuhah nakpi takin hong daupaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na pu na pate uh tungah amah a lungkim mah bangin note tungah Topa hong lungkim kik ding a, note hong daupaisak ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-a kong gen hih thupiakna pen note-a' dingin a haksa lua hilo a, na zuihlah ding uh zong hilo hi
Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theihna dingin kua in vantungah eite-a' dingin hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theihna dingun vantunga om hilo hi
Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theihna dingin kua in tuipi galkhatah hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theihna dingun tuipi gala om zong hilo hi
A thu, hong nai mahmah hi. Note in na hih theihna dingun na kamsung uh leh na lungsim sung uhah om hi
“Tuni-in na teel dingun note' mai-ah nuntakna leh a hoih na, sihna leh siatna ka koih khinzo hi

Topa na Pasian uh itna, ama lampite totna, ama thupiaknate leh ama thukhamte leh ama ngeina kipte zuihna tawh, tuni-a no tungah kong gen ahi Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate na man' uh leh, note nungta-in tampi na pha ding uh a, a luah dingin note na lutna uh leitang tungah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia ding hi
Ahih hangin na lungsim uh kihei-in, note in amah zuiloin, pasian dangte a bia ding leh a na a sem dingin note na kiheikhiat uh leh
tuni-in note tungah hih thu kong genkhol hi: Note na si ding uh a, Jordan kantanin note a lut ding leh a nei dingin na paina uh leitang tungah sauvei na nungta kei ding uh hi

Tuni-in note' langkhatah teci a pang dingin vantung leh leitung ka sam a, note' mai-ah na teel dingun nuntakna leh sihna, thupha leh samsiatna ka koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note leh na suanlekhakte uh na hin'theihna dingun nuntakna teel un la

Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama thu mangin, amah beel un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tungah piak dingin a kiciamsa leitangah note na ten'theihna dingun tua pen note-a' dingin nuntakna leh khan'sauna ahi hi,” a ci hi.
